$comment: Hand-maintained Figma↔code mapping for the moment-card library. Equivalent to Code Connect, which requires Org/Enterprise — this file is the Pro-tier substitute. Update when a card kind gets a Figma component or a TS implementation. Sourced and rendered by `src/server/services/personalization/moment-render-v2.ts`.

mappings.archetype: Emphatic, dramatic — oversized type as imagery, destructive red against dark surface, broken horizontal rule motif.
Kinetic, ascending — giant level numeral as hero, xp-gold/amber palette, emerald chevron-stack motif suggesting growth.
Retrospective, trophied — poster format with longer body text, xp-gold + emerald palette, metallic divider with star glyph.

designSystemBindings.color/xp-gold: TOKENS.xpGold (season hero + kicker pill + metallic divider)
designSystemBindings.color/success: TOKENS.success (top-scorer stat accent + streak pulse + pip)

textStyles: (inline 52px Bold for season hero, 18px Medium for squad subtitle)

dataShape.label: Season name (e.g. 'Spring \'26')
dataShape.detail: Multi-line: squad name on first line, stats summary on subsequent lines (2nd stat line is rendered with --success accent)

mappings.archetype: Archival, monochromatic, calendar-led — date as the dominant visual element. Most-used kind in production (every historical match imported via squad-import produces one).

designSystemBindings.color/foreground: TOKENS.foreground (hero date + body — monochromatic by design)

textStyles: (inline 88px Bold for date day-month, 28px Light for year)

dataShape.label: W/D/L prefix + score + opponent (e.g. 'W 3-2 vs Ballygally United')
dataShape.createdAt: The historical match date — drives the hero numeral

mappings.archetype: Civic, badge-led, formal — concentric emerald crest with xp-gold rings + center dot, achievement title below, supporting detail underneath. Reads as a medal or certificate.

dataShape.label: Achievement title (e.g. 'FIRST CLEAN SHEET')
dataShape.detail: Earning context (e.g. 'No goals conceded across a full 90 — Marcus Tate, defender')

mappings.archetype: Identity-forward, generative, mysterious — subject's name dominates as hero, constellation of low-opacity violet dots as generative motif.

designSystemBindings.color/identity: TOKENS.identity (kicker pill + role line + constellation dots)

textStyles: (inline 56px Bold for hero name, 18px Light for role line)

mappings.archetype: Tactical, board-like — broadcast tactical graphic with pitch silhouette + formation dots on the left, W-D-L stat panel on the right. Data-dense, strategic mood.

designSystemBindings.color/team-home: TOKENS.teamHome (kicker + home formation dots + wins stat)

dataShape.label: Optional 'NW MD ML' summary; parsed for W/D/L counts
dataShape.detail: Simulation context (e.g. '10-match round-robin · Brockenhurst Rovers Twin')

mappings.archetype: Civic, official, certificate-led — slightly-rotated stamp with the milestone count + 'VERIFIED', title and subtitle on the right. Ties to the onchain preservation thesis.
textStyles: (inline 44px Bold for stamp count, 24px Bold for title)

dataShape.label: Milestone label with embedded count (e.g. '100 MATCHES ATTESTED')
dataShape.detail: Optional override; defaults to the preservation tagline

mappings.archetype: Welcoming, warm, introductory — coach name as if quoted/signed, soft indigo portrait-light radial gradient on the right. Start date prominent in footer.

designSystemBindings.color/welcome: TOKENS.welcome (kicker pill, quote mark, role line, portrait-light radial)

textStyles: (inline 48px Bold for quote mark, 44px Bold for coach name)

dataShape.label: Coach name
dataShape.detail: Optional role/duration line (e.g. 'YOUR NEW COACH · 8 WEEKS · TACTICAL FOCUS')
dataShape.createdAt: Coaching start date — rendered prominently in the footer

mappings.archetype: Quiet, valedictory, archival — restrained type weight, thin rose closing line under the coach name. Mood is 'closing' not 'celebrating'. Pairs with coaching_hired.

designSystemBindings.color/closing: TOKENS.closing (kicker pill, closing line, attribute-delta line)

textStyles: (inline 30px Medium for coach name — smaller than hired, intentionally)

dataShape.label: Coach name (the engagement that ended)
dataShape.detail: Optional summary of duration + outcome (e.g. '8 weeks · Tactical Focus · 19 Apr → 14 Jun')

fallback.note: Applies to any moment kind without a dedicated archetype entry above. Keeps the design system (Space Grotesk + dark surface + token-based tier color) but mirrors the v1 template composition. Replace with per-kind archetypes as they're added.
